summary: Iteration 19 - NENO Exchange Complete Testing. All backend APIs (19/19 tests passed) and frontend UI (all 5 tabs verified) working correctly. The NENO Exchange supports Buy/Sell NENO, Swap any token pair, Off-Ramp to card/bank, and Create Custom Tokens.

issues: WalletConnect preloadListings error - non-critical, external service

critical_code_review_comments: NENO Exchange fully functional with 5 tabs: Compra (Buy), Vendi (Sell), Swap, Off-Ramp, Crea Token
Dynamic NENO pricing working: base EUR 10,000 with orderbook pressure adjustment (±5% max)
All quote endpoints return correct calculations with 0.3% platform fee
Swap supports any token pair including custom tokens (uses NENO as bridge)
Off-ramp supports both card and bank (SEPA) destinations
Custom token creation mints supply to creator's wallet
Transaction history displays all operation types with timestamps
NENO balance displayed in header updates after operations
seed_data_creation: Custom token TT9802 created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: NENO Exchange fully tested in iteration 19. All 5 tabs working: Buy (Compra), Sell (Vendi), Swap, Off-Ramp, Create Token (Crea Token). Backend APIs all pass. Custom tokens TEST and TT9802 exist in DB. Admin has ~9999 NENO balance.

backend_public_endpoints.GET /api/neno-exchange/market: PASS - Returns neno_eur_price, supported_assets, pairs, custom_tokens
backend_public_endpoints.GET /api/neno-exchange/price: PASS - Returns dynamic pricing with orderbook pressure
backend_public_endpoints.GET /api/neno-exchange/quote?direction=b: PASS - Returns buy quote with rate, fee, total_cost
backend_public_endpoints.GET /api/neno-exchange/quote?direction=s: PASS - Returns sell quote with net_receive
backend_public_endpoints.GET /api/neno-exchange/swap-quote: PASS - Returns swap quote for any token pair
backend_public_endpoints.GET /api/neno-exchange/custom-tokens: PASS - Returns list of custom tokens

backend_authenticated_endpoints.GET /api/wallet/balances: PASS - Returns wallet balances including NENO
backend_authenticated_endpoints.POST /api/neno-exchange/create-token: PASS - Creates custom token, mints to creator
backend_authenticated_endpoints.POST /api/neno-exchange/offramp: PASS - Off-ramps NENO to card or bank

backend_validation.same_asset_swap_rejected: PASS - Returns 400 for same from/to asset

frontend_tabs.Compra (Buy): PASS - Asset selector, amount input, live quote, buy button
frontend_tabs.Vendi (Sell): PASS - Asset selector, amount input, live quote, sell button
frontend_tabs.Swap: PASS - From/to selectors, amount input, live quote, reverse button, swap button
frontend_tabs.Off-Ramp: PASS - Amount input, card/bank selector, IBAN/beneficiary fields for bank, quote, offramp button
frontend_tabs.Crea Token: PASS - Symbol, name, price, supply inputs, dynamic create button

frontend_components.Transaction history: PASS - Shows BUY, SELL, SWAP, OFFRAMP transactions with timestamps
